terms.acceptanceBody: By accessing or using Asset Atlas Pro, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree, do not use the platform. These terms apply to all users including property managers, vendors, contractors, and any other individuals accessing the service.
terms.descriptionBody: Asset Atlas Pro is a real estate operations platform providing tools for property acquisitions and underwriting (Atlas Acquire), property management and operations (Atlas Operate), and vendor/contractor business management (Atlas Pro). The platform includes inspection capture, work order management, estimating, invoicing, and related features.
terms.accountsBody: You must provide accurate and complete information when creating an account. You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your login credentials and for all activities that occur under your account. You must notify us immediately of any unauthorized use of your account.
terms.useBody: You agree to use Asset Atlas Pro only for lawful purposes and in accordance with these terms. You may not use the platform to transmit harmful content, attempt to gain unauthorized access to systems, interfere with other users' access, or violate any applicable laws or regulations.
terms.ipBody: Asset Atlas Pro and its original content, features, and functionality are owned by Asset Atlas Pro and are protected by intellectual property laws. You retain ownership of any data, photos, and content you upload to the platform. By uploading content, you grant us a license to store, process, and display that content as necessary to provide the service.
terms.dataBody: You are responsible for all data and content you enter into the platform. Property inspection data, photos, financial information, and other content you create remain your property. We will not sell your data to third parties. Data may be shared between users on the platform as necessary for the service (e.g., work orders shared between property managers and vendors).
terms.disclaimerBody: Asset Atlas Pro is provided on an "as is" and "as available" basis without warranties of any kind, either express or implied. We do not guarantee that the service will be uninterrupted, error-free, or secure. Financial calculations, property assessments, and deal analyses provided by the platform are tools for reference and do not constitute professional financial or real estate advice.
terms.limitationBody: To the maximum extent permitted by law, Asset Atlas Pro shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages arising from your use of the platform. This includes but is not limited to loss of data, loss of profits, or business interruption.
terms.terminationBody: We reserve the right to suspend or terminate your account at any time for violation of these terms. You may also terminate your account at any time by contacting support. Upon termination, your right to use the platform ceases immediately, though we may retain your data for a reasonable period as required by law.
terms.changesBody: We may update these terms from time to time. We will notify registered users of significant changes via email or in-app notification. Your continued use of the platform after changes constitutes acceptance of the updated terms.
terms.contactBody: For questions about these Terms of Service, contact us at support@assetatlaspro.com.

privacy.collectBody: We collect information you provide directly: name, email address, organization details, and account credentials. We also collect data you enter into the platform including property information, inspection data, photos, financial data, work orders, estimates, and invoices. We automatically collect usage data such as device information, browser type, and interaction patterns to improve the service.
privacy.useBody: We use your information to provide and maintain the platform, process your transactions, send transactional notifications (work order updates, estimate approvals, invoice status), improve our services, and communicate with you about your account. We do not use your data for advertising purposes.
privacy.storageBody: Your data is stored securely using Supabase (PostgreSQL) with Row Level Security (RLS) enabled on all tables. Photos and media are stored in secure cloud storage. We use industry-standard encryption for data in transit (TLS/SSL) and implement access controls to protect your information. While we strive to protect your data, no method of transmission over the internet is 100% secure.
privacy.sharingBody: We do not sell your personal information. Data is shared between platform users only as necessary for the service — for example, work orders are shared between property managers and assigned vendors, and inspection reports are shared with authorized team members. We may share information with service providers who help us operate the platform (email delivery, cloud hosting) under strict data processing agreements.
privacy.cookiesBody: We use cookies to maintain your session, remember your language preference, and store your authentication state. The platform also uses browser local storage (IndexedDB) to enable offline functionality — this data stays on your device and syncs to our servers when you reconnect.
privacy.rightsBody: You have the right to access, correct, or delete your personal data. You can export your inspection data and reports at any time using the platform's built-in export features. To request account deletion or a copy of all your data, contact support@assetatlaspro.com.
privacy.childrenBody: Asset Atlas Pro is not intended for use by individuals under the age of 18. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children.
privacy.changesBody: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. We will notify you of significant changes via email or in-app notification. Your continued use of the platform after changes constitutes acceptance of the updated policy.
privacy.contactBody: For questions about this Privacy Policy or to exercise your data rights, contact us at support@assetatlaspro.com.

auth.checkEmail: Check your email for a confirmation link, then sign in.

landing.heroSubtitle: Four products. One ecosystem. From the first property walk to the last invoice — Asset Atlas replaces your clipboard, your spreadsheets, and your fragmented tool stack.
landing.socialProofLine: Built for real estate professionals who need tools that work offline, on-site, and across teams.
landing.whoIsThisForSubtitle: Find the product that fits your role. Start there. Expand when ready.
landing.roleInvestorsDesc: Walk properties, model deals, close with confidence
landing.roleManagersDesc: Inspect units, dispatch vendors, manage turns
landing.roleHomeownersDesc: Submit work orders, find vendors, protect your home
landing.fourProductsSubtitle: Each works standalone. Together they're unstoppable.
landing.threeProductsSubtitle: Each works standalone. Together they're unstoppable.

acquire.desc: Walk the property. Model the deal. Close with confidence. Everything from first DD walk to signed contract in one platform.
acquire.audience: For investors · Acquisition teams · Asset managers · Syndicators
acquire.feat1: Full property walk capture — offline, photo/video, notes
acquire.feat2: Section framework: Site, Mechanical, Common, Amenities, Units
acquire.feat3: Condition ratings, risk flags, exposure estimates, useful life
acquire.feat4: 5 export formats: Full PDF, Summary, Photo Book, ZIP, Excel
acquire.feat5: Inputs, KPIs, Unit Mix, Income/Expenses, Rehab Budget
acquire.feat6: 5-Year Pro Forma, Returns & Exit, Scorecard, Flip Analysis
acquire.feat7: Go/No-Go signals — instant pass/fail on 8 performance checks
acquire.feat8: DD data flows to Atlas Operate when deal closes

operate.desc: Run the asset day-to-day. Inspections generate work orders. Unit turns auto-prioritize. Vendors execute. You stay in control.
operate.audience: For property managers · Maintenance coordinators · Regional managers
operate.feat1: Internal PCA — full section framework with System Health Reports
operate.feat2: Move-in / Move-out inspections for lease transitions
operate.feat4: Findings auto-create work orders — split across trades
operate.feat5: 100-item checklist: Kitchen, Bath, Electrical, Doors, Flooring+
operate.feat6: Dynamic board auto-reprioritizes by move-in date
operate.feat7: Move-out → punch list → vendor tasks pipeline
operate.feat8: Create WOs → assign vendor → track → approve
operate.feat9: Vendor estimates: review, approve, request revision

pro.desc: Run your contracting business from one platform. Receive jobs, estimate, invoice, schedule — and offer inspections as a service.
pro.audience: For contractors · Handymen · HVAC · Plumbing · Electrical · Maintenance cos
pro.feat3: Job detail with PM notes + access notes
pro.feat4: Create & send estimates to PM or direct clients
pro.pcaLite: PCA Lite — Inspections as a Service
pro.feat7: Offer PCA Lite inspections to your own clients
pro.feat8: Same pro engine — full section framework, condition ratings
pro.feat9: Branded reports — deliver professional assessment docs
pro.feat10: Conduct inspections on PM's behalf (specialist trades)
pro.feat13: Marketplace profile — get discovered by homeowners
pro.feat14: Messaging — contextual threads on every job

home.title: Atlas Home
home.desc: Your home. Your vendors. Your maintenance pool. Submit work orders, browse the marketplace, and never get surprised by a repair bill again.
home.feat1: Monthly subscription builds your maintenance pool
home.feat2: Pool pays vendors when work is done — no surprise bills
home.feat3: Unused balance rolls over month to month
home.feat5: Submit requests with photos, category, and urgency
home.feat6: Auto-matched to best available vendor nearby
home.feat7: Track progress in real-time with vendor photos
home.feat8: Rate vendors on completion — feeds marketplace
home.feat9: Browse by trade — ratings, reviews, response time
home.feat11: Message vendor directly on every job
home.feat12: Annual or semi-annual PCA Lite inspection (Standard+)
home.feat13: Inspection findings become recommended work orders
home.feat14: Warranty window on completed work (30–60 days)

landing.howItConnectsSubtitle: Data flows between products automatically. No re-entry. No export/import. Just seamless handoffs.
landing.operateFlow: DD baseline flows in → inspect → create WOs
landing.acquireToOperateDesc: Deal closes. DD walk data, photos, CAPEX flags, and unit grading automatically become the property's baseline in Operate. Zero re-entry.
landing.acquireToOperateBenefit: No re-keying. When a deal closes, the property appears in Operate ready to manage.
landing.operateToProDesc: PM inspection findings auto-create work orders and dispatch to vendors in Pro. Vendor completes work, submits invoice, PM approves.
landing.operateToProBenefit: PMs never chase vendors. Work orders flow directly to the right contractor.
landing.proToOperateDesc: Vendor conducts inspections on PM's behalf. Submits findings. PM reviews and creates follow-up WOs.
landing.proToOperateBenefit: Vendors deliver inspection results right back into the PM's dashboard.
landing.homeToProDesc: Homeowner submits work order. System suggests vendors from marketplace. Vendor receives job, estimates, completes, invoices.
landing.homeToProBenefit: Homeowners get pro-quality work without searching Craigslist or Nextdoor.
landing.whatsLiveSubtitle: See what you can use today and what's on the roadmap.
landing.builtToExpandSubtitle: Every module is designed to grow. Here's what's live, what's coming, and what's on the roadmap.
landing.acquireLive: Live now: DD Walk capture (full section framework, condition ratings, risk flags, exposure estimates, 5 export formats), Deal Analyzer (9 tabs), Field Mode offline sync.
landing.acquireComing: Coming next: ACQ → PM handoff pipeline, portfolio pipeline dashboard, comparative deal analysis.
landing.acquireFuture: Future: Market comp integration, automated rent roll analysis, LP reporting module, deal sharing/collaboration.
landing.operateLive: Live now: Internal inspections (PCA + PCA Lite), Unit Turns (100-item checklist, batch management, export), Field Mode offline sync.
landing.operateComing: Coming next: Work order creation & dispatch, vendor estimate/invoice approval, vendor network management, PM schedule/calendar, expense tracking.
landing.operateFuture: Future: Dynamic make-ready board, inspection → WO auto-creation, leasing pipeline, property portfolio dashboard, reporting engine.
landing.proLive: Live now: Vendor dashboard, WO management, estimates & invoices, job scheduling, client management, messaging, PCA Lite inspections, revenue/expense tracking, bilingual (EN/ES).
landing.proComing: Coming next: Vendor-conducted inspections on PM's behalf, public marketplace profile, availability & capacity management.
landing.proFuture: Future: Vendor marketplace, P&L reporting by client, vendor matching engine, Stripe Connect payments, vendor verification.
landing.homePlanned: Planned: Submit WOs with photos, track status, message vendor/PM, view inspection results, vendor marketplace browsing, maintenance pool subscription, Stripe Connect payments.
landing.sharedDesc: Inspections Engine (6 types, one UI), Work Orders (role-aware views), Estimates & Invoices (linked to WOs), Media Library (RLS-scoped), Messaging (Twilio), Field Mode (offline sync).
landing.pickYourRoleSubtitle: One platform. Choose where you start. Everything connects.
landing.readyCtaSubtitle: Start with the product that fits your role. Expand when you're ready. Everything connects.

bankReadyMode.description: Bank-Ready mode requires priority, exposure, RUL, and condition ratings on all sections and findings.
bankReadyMode.sfrNote: SFR mode labels unit sections as "Homes" instead of "Units".
